content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt explicitly calls this build a "public beta" and says "we're still testing the new sync feature, so expect rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2).
Pierre: Apple explicitly requires TestFlight for beta distribution and rejects App Store copy that signals the build is unfinished, since it undermines user trust in what "final" means. Your release notes read like a beta announcement asking users to report bugs, which is a clear reviewer red flag. Rewrite the release notes to describe the sync feature as a shipped, finished capability (or hold it back until it's ready) before submitting.
